pi_items.metadata_value: HST Eagle Nebula H-alpha (656nm) from ESA FITS Liberator
pi_items.verified_value: HST Eagle Nebula H-alpha (656nm) from ESA FITS Liberator
pi_items.source: install_astroimagej.sh script downloads esahubble.org/static/projects/fits_liberator/datasets/eagle/656nmos.zip and FITS header verifies WFPC2 observation of M16-A

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real HST Eagle Nebula FITS data (M16) downloaded from the ESA FITS Liberator repository. The agent must create an optical depth report at /home/ga/AstroImages/optical_depth/output/optical_depth_report.txt.
